HGSS.118.0000:
Director: Who? What? You came to
rescue me? Thank you!\f
The Radio Tower!
What’s happening there?\f
Taken over by Team Rocket?
Here. Take this Card Key.\f
HGSS.118.0002:
Director: Use that to open the
shutters on 3F.\f
HGSS.118.0003:
I’m begging you to help.\f
There’s no telling what they’ll do if
they control the transmitter.\f
They may even be able to control
Pokémon using a special signal!\f
You’re the only one I can call on.
Please save the Radio Tower...\r
and all the Pokémon nationwide!
